ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Report
Off Calendar Jun-01-2011 Continued To Aug-31-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Peter Muhs for Lawrence Duvall (Executor).

Mr. Muhs stated that he had spoken with Mr. Duvall, that Mr. Duvall stated that he will advance the funds to stop the lien on the house so the Estate can close, that he has to run this by the Albany beneficiary which he hasn't been able to do yet, that he is trying to get statements from three years ago so that the accounting will balance, and that he anticipates being able to file a petition for final distribution in August. The matter was continued to August 31, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the filing of a petition for final distribution. If the petition for final distribution is on calendar by August 31, 2011 the status will go off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
